title: rosa × reversa var. sauzeana
intro: Rosa × reversa var. sauzeana, also known as Sauzean Rose or Wild Rose, is a rare and lesser-known species of rose that is native to the Italian Alps. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rosa × reversa var. sauzeana include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies for skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat a range of skin issues.
